## Meeting Purpose

[Demo Marcel's personal AI system and discuss its implications for the framework.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**10x Productivity:** Marcel's personal AI system, built on a highly curated file structure, enables single-prompt, multi-step tasks (e.g., sales reports, coaching notes) that are "legit perfect."](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [**New User Archetype:** The system validates the emergence of a "plain text engineer" archetype—a non-developer with an engineering mindset who uses AI to build complex, reproducible pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=3569.0)
  - [**Framework Validation:** The system confirms the framework's file-system-based approach is viable for non-technical users. The key challenge is packaging these complex, reproducible pipelines into shareable "micro-apps" for a broader audience.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [**Immediate Focus:** The team will prioritize core features (Sentry, cost tracking) for the upcoming release. Future work will focus on a workflow registry, flexible I/O, and a global API to support this new user archetype.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Personal AI System

  - [**Core Problem:** Standard AI projects fail due to static context files that quickly become outdated.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**Solution:** A dynamic, file-system-based system in Cursor/Claude Co-work that uses GitHub for version control.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Architecture:**](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
      - [**Context Folder:** Stores core identity files (Voice, Roles, Personal) that are versioned and archived.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [**Records Folder:** Ingests raw data (meeting transcripts, HubSpot downloads).](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
      - [**Pipeline Folder:** A multi-stage process for deep research:](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
          - [`research` → `scratchpad` (raw notes) → `outputs` (study guide) → `knowledge` (polished doc).](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [**Automation & Maintenance:**](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
      - [**Skills:** Automate repetitive tasks (e.g., pulling meetings, processing transcripts, updating file metadata).](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
      - [**Rules:** Ensure consistent file naming and automatically update `README.md` and `index.md` files after each run.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
      - [**`README.md`:** Kept under 60 lines for efficient agent guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [**Demonstrated Capabilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [**Sales Pipeline Report:** Pulled meeting transcripts, queried HubSpot for deal changes, and posted a perfect pipeline update to Slack—a task that previously took the team two hours.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [**Sales Coaching Notes:** Generated targeted coaching notes for a colleague by analyzing their meeting transcripts and comparing them to Marcel's sales style.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [**Personal User Manual:** Created a complete user manual by combining a self-psychoanalysis (from transcripts) with a study guide on writing user manuals.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)

### Implications for the Framework

  - [**Validation:** The system confirms the framework's file-system-based approach is effective for non-technical users.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [**New User Archetype:** The system validates the emergence of a "plain text engineer," who faces familiar engineering challenges (data storage, versioning, debugging) but uses AI and plain text files as their primary tools.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=3569.0)
  - [**Future Features:** The discussion identified key features needed to support this archetype:](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=2490.0)
      - [**Workflow Registry:** To package and share reproducible pipelines as "micro-apps."](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=3767.0)
      - [**Flexible I/O:** To enable workflows to read from and write to local files or external services.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
      - [**Global API:** To provide a scalable, plug-and-play interface for framework services.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=3966.0)
      - [**Advanced Evaluation:** To ensure consistent output quality (e.g., voice, persona) using offline evaluation.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=3441.0)
  - [**Immediate Roadmap:** The team agreed to prioritize core features (Sentry, cost tracking) for the upcoming release, deferring these future-looking features.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=2965.0)
      - [Continue developing and sharing the "Context OS" starter kit.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
      - [Host a 5-hour workshop to teach the system to the team.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=2965.0)
  - [**Daniel:**](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=3036.0)
      - [Share the "Context OS" repo and handbook with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=3036.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)
      - [Prioritize core features (Sentry, cost tracking) for the upcoming release.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)
      - [Begin conceptualizing a global API for the framework.](https://fathom.video/share/_LFZxkDosmFQfjWT1xFev2HQzk1UVg1a?tab=summary&timestamp=3966.0)
